title: Raccoon Removal in Massapequa, NY | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Massapequa, Long Island. Licensed experts offering humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup. Call now for fast service: $900–$4,000.
intro: Raccoons are a growing problem in Massapequa neighborhoods, often invading attics, garages, and crawl spaces in search of shelter and food. Our licensed raccoon removal specialists provide humane, effective solutions tailored to Long Island homes and properties. With same-day service available throughout Massapequa, we'll safely remove raccoons and prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Massapequa and the greater Long Island area for years with certified wildlife technicians who understand local raccoon behavior patterns. We offer comprehensive solutions including humane trapping, entry point sealing, attic restoration, and 24/7 emergency response with upfront pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Massapequa's tree-lined streets, proximity to Massapequa Preserve, and mix of ranch-style homes and two-story colonials create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially near Marjorie Post Community Park and residential areas close to Massapequa Creek. The abundance of mature trees and accessible roof lines in neighborhoods around Unqua Elementary and near the Sunrise Highway corridor make attic invasions particularly common during spring breeding season.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Massapequa typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of entry points, and extent of damage. A basic single raccoon removal with simple exclusion starts around $900, while extensive infestations requiring multiple traps, attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and comprehensive sealing can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Massapequa neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Massapequa due to the area's mature trees, proximity to the Massapequa Preserve, and abundant food sources in residential areas. They're particularly active in spring and fall, frequently entering attics, chimneys, and sheds. Neighborhoods near wooded areas and the preserve see the highest activity, but raccoons have adapted well to all parts of Massapequa.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Massapequa home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Massapequa and can typically conduct an initial inspection within 2-4 hours of your call. Trap placement begins immediately after inspection, and most raccoons are captured within 3-7 days. Complete exclusion work to seal entry points is performed once all animals are removed, usually within one week of initial contact.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State wildlife regulations and use only humane live trapping methods. Raccoons are safely relocated to approved areas away from residential zones. We never use poisons or lethal methods, and we take special care during baby season (spring) to ensure mothers and offspring are kept together and removed humanely.
